# Classroom 6x

> Play free unblocked games on Classroom 6x. Enjoy popular games like Slope, Retro Bowl, Snow Rider 3D and more. No download needed.

## Essential Links

- [Home](https://classroom6x.store/): The main hub for all unblocked games for school.
- [Sitemap](https://classroom6x.store/sitemap.xml): A comprehensive index of all available games and articles.
- [Action Category](https://classroom6x.store/category/action): Collection of high-intensity action games.
- [Multiplayer Category](https://classroom6x.store/category/multiplayer): Games designed for online competition.
- [Blog](https://classroom6x.store/blogs): Latest news, game reviews, and accessibility tips.

## Featured Games

- [Basket Random](https://classroom6x.store/game/basket-random): A wacky physics-based basketball game.
- [Slope](https://classroom6x.store/game/slope): The ultimate high-speed reaction test.
- [Retro Bowl](https://classroom6x.store/game/retro-bowl): Classic pixel-art American football management.
- [Snow Rider 3D](https://classroom6x.store/game/snow-rider-3d): Winter sports adventure in full 3D.
- [Run 3](https://classroom6x.store/game/run-3): Infinite runner set in a futuristic space tunnel.
